title: Contradictory trial required; time to file opposition
doc_html:
SECTION 3. CONTRADICTORY PROBATE OF TESTAMENTS

Art. 2901. Contradictory trial required; time to file opposition

            If an objection is made to the ex parte probate of a testament, as provided in Article 2882, the testament may be probated only at a contradictory trial of the matter.

Acts 2025, No. 34, §1.
doc_text:
SECTION 3.  CONTRADICTORY PROBATE OF TESTAMENTS
Art. 2901.  Contradictory trial required; time to file opposition
If an objection is made to the ex parte probate of a testament, as provided in Article
2882, the testament may be probated only at a contradictory trial of the matter.
Acts 2025, No. 34, §1.
